title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・大空までの滑走路

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having won the autumn Tenno Sho, Mayano Top
Gun has grown into a racer who truly makes her
fans roar with excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later while training, she spies Narita
Brian partner running with Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the image of Narita Brian shining brightly in
her mind, she vows to give it her all at the Arima
Kinen.
